message:
feat(scheduler): Local queue fast path for spawn() + golden benchmark formatting

three_lane.rs:
- spawn() now checks CURRENT_LOCAL thread-local before falling back
  to global inject_ready, routing tasks to the worker's local
  PriorityScheduler when called from a worker thread
- Uses optimistic notify() check via runtime state to avoid redundant
  scheduling of already-notified tasks

benches/golden_output.rs:
- Formatting cleanup: single-line imports, remove blank lines,
  flatten closure arguments to match rustfmt output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
